name: Structured web scraper with AI
description: Scrapes any web page using Firecrawl, uses Claude to extract structured JSON data based on a user-defined schema, and posts the extracted data to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Scrape any web page into structured JSON data with ScrapeNinja and AI

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

schema.description: Description of the data structure to extract (e.g. 'Extract product listings with: title, price, rating, description, image URL')

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the extracted data

steps.name: Scrape the target URL with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for structured extraction
Run Claude AI for structured data extraction
Build Slack Block Kit message with extracted data
